message:
feat(fcp-mesh): expand mesh networking with admission policy, device management, and gossip improvements

admission.rs:
- Extend admission policy evaluation with additional constraint types
  and priority-based rule ordering
- Add tests for policy conflict resolution, rule precedence, and
  boundary cases in admission decisions

device.rs:
- Expand device management with lifecycle state tracking, capability
  advertisement updates, and heartbeat-based liveness detection
- Add tests for device registration, capability negotiation, stale
  device eviction, and concurrent state transitions

gossip.rs:
- Improve gossip protocol message handling with deduplication and
  fan-out control
- Add tests for message propagation, duplicate suppression, and
  fan-out limiting under high-membership scenarios

symbol_request.rs:
- Refine symbol request routing with load-aware target selection
- Apply rustfmt formatting to assertion expressions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
